sources.title: The 10th Victim 1965
sources.description: In a future when people indulge in human hunts for entertainment a veteran huntress' plan to kill a victim for a major TV sponsorship deal is compounded by romance.

metadata.Plot: A campy futuristic tale where people hunt one another for sport. In this film, Victim and Hunter run around Italy trying to score a kill in front of the movie crews they arranged so they could make commercials from the footage.
metadata.Writer: Robert Sheckley, Tonino Guerra, Giorgio Salvioni
metadata.Actors: Marcello Mastroianni, Ursula Andress, Elsa Martinelli
